decision.reason: The checkout-api sev2 alert is declared in policy; the sealed runbook binds both page and incident PR targets, and 8.2% 5xx for 16 minutes exceeds the 2% for 10 minutes threshold.

packet.pr_review_note_body: Include error-rate graph, deploy sha 4f21c9e, rollback candidate, and customer-impact note.

fix_bundle.suggested_first_check: compare checkout-api 4f21c9e with previous healthy deploy

escalation.reason: This skill only emits a bounded packet; paging and incident PR creation require separate governed dispatch.
